title: phalaris sativa
intro: Phalaris sativa, also known as canary grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The health benefits of Phalaris sativa include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce symptoms of allergies, and alleviate digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. The herbal preparations of Phalaris sativa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
